LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC, OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE 1ST COA IS OVERRULED. WHILE SOME OF THE ISSUES ALLEGED IN THIS CAUSE OF ACTION WILL BE DETERMINE BY THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF IS PERMITTED TO PLEAD IT. THE 2ND COA IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED THE ELEMENTS FOR A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. THE 3RD COA IS OVERRULED. AN ACCOUNTING IS A SUIT IN EQUITY AND PLAINTIFF CAN REQUEST THAT THE AMOUNT CLAIMED DUE UNDER THE NOTE IS DETERMINED. THE 4TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS BECAUSE THERE WAS NO CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND THESE DEFENDANTS. THE 5TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE IS NO CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF AND THESE DEFENDANTS. THE 6TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED THIS CAUSE OF ACTION WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY AS TO THESE DEFENDANTS. THE 7TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED NO FACTS TO SUPPORT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. THE 8TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED WITH SPECIFICITY WHAT ACTS THESE DEFENDANTS DID THAT VIOLATE THE UCL. THE 9TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE 10TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT WAS RECORDED BEFORE THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THESE CODE SECTION WITH WAS 7/8/08. THE 11TH COA IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CLAIM UNDER THE FDPCA AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE RESPA CLAIM. NON-JUDICIAL FORECLOSURE UNDER A DEED OF TRUST DOES NOT QUALIFY AS A COLLECTION OF DEBT THEREFORE THE FDPCA CLAIM FAILS. AS TO THE RESPA CLAIMS, PLAINTIFF HAS PLED NO FACTS TO THE SUPPORT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Continued To Sep-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Unknown
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS C/O DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Brent A. Kramer, Esq. of Houser & Allison, APC 949/679-1111 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendants' Demurrer to the 1st cause of action for Declaratory Relief is overruled. While some of the issues alleged in this cause of action will be determine by the other causes of action in the complaint, Plaintiff is permitted to plead it.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action for an injunction is overruled. Plaintiff has pled the elements for a cause of action for injunctive relief.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action for Accounting is overruled. An accounting is a suit in equity and Plaintiff can request that the amount claimed due under the Note is determined.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 4th cause of action for Breach of Covenant of Good Faith is sustained without leave to amend. This cause of action fails because there was no contract between Plaintiff and these defendants.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 5th cause for action for Breach of Contract is sustained without leave to amend. There is no contract between the plaintiff and these defendants.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 6th cause of action for Fraud is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not pled this cause of action with requisite specificity as to these defendants.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 7th cause of action for Unfair Business Practices is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has pled no facts to support this cause of action.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 8th cause of action for Violation of the UCL is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not pled with specificity what acts these Defendants did that violate the UCL.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 9th cause of action for Wrongful Disclosure is sustained without leave to amend.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 10th cause of action for Violation of CC 2923.5 - 2923.6 is sustained without leave to amend. The Notice of Default was recorded before the effective date of these Code Section with was 7/8/08.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 11th cause of action for Violation of the Fair Debt Collections Practices Act and RESPA is sustained without leave to amend as to the claim under the FDPCA and sustained with leave to amend as to the RESPA claim. Non-judicial foreclosure under a deed of trust does not qualify as a collection of debt therefore the FDPCA claim fails. As to the RESPA claims, plaintiff has pled no facts to the support this cause of action.
In addition, the Court indicated plaintiff has 20 days leave to amend. (Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
